scripts.deploy-cloudflare: NITRO_PRESET=cloudflare_module npm run build && npx wrangler deploy && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.prepare-ai: pnpx skills add antfu/skills -a codex -s nuxt -y && pnpx skills add obra/superpowers --skill using-superpowers -a codex -y && pnpx skills add onmax/nuxt-skills --skill nuxthub -a codex -y
